performers.title: 🔫 Bullets in Space: The Unanswered Question
performers.script: Bullets in space. No air, no sound. Gravity warps trajectory. On Mars, a shot fires. In vacuum, it never stops. On Venus, it melts. On Jupiter, it disintegrates. The question remains: what happens when you fire a gun on different planets? Bullets in space

performers.title: 🚀 Black Holes: Gravity's Kill Switch
performers.script: Gravity has a kill switch. It's called a black hole. Stars collapse. Space-time buckles. Nothing escapes. Not even light. Matter implodes. Energy implodes. Time implodes. The point of no return is near. The event horizon looms. Cosmic collapse is inevitable. The universe is full of them. And they're growing. Gravity has a kill switch, and it's pulling us in, where gravity has a kill switch

performers.title: 🔪 Kitchen Secrets: The Dark Science 🍳
performers.hook: Your kitchen is a war zone
performers.script: Your kitchen is a war zone. Chemical reactions rage. Molecular bonds shatter. Every cut, a microscopic massacre. Enzymes collide, flavors annihilate. The science behind kitchen hacks: a twisted game of thermal dynamics. Maillard's sinister art. Flavor, a mere casualty. And at the heart of it all, a singular truth: your kitchen is a war zone, where the next meal is the next battlefield, and your kitchen is a war zone
